description: Project scaffolding: Create the full teleexport/ project structure with all config files, dependency manifests, and directory hierarchy as specified in the technical plan.
steps: Create package.json with all frontend dependencies: electron ^33, react ^19, typescript ^5.6, tailwindcss ^4, zustand ^5, react-router-dom ^7, lucide-react, recharts, @tanstack/react-query ^5, vite ^6, electron-builder ^25, vitest, @testing-library/react. Include scripts: dev, build, preview, test, electron:dev
Create tsconfig.json with strict mode, JSX react-jsx, paths for @/ alias to src/
Create vite.config.ts with React plugin, path alias @/ -> src/, and electron build target
Create electron-builder.yml as specified in the plan (appId: com.teleexport.app, productName: TeleExport, with mac/win/linux targets, extraResources for python/)

Create python/pyproject.toml with project metadata and all dependencies: telethon>=2.0, jinja2>=3.1, pillow>=11, python-magic>=0.4.27, cryptg>=0.4, orjson>=3.10, aiofiles>=24, tqdm>=4.66, emoji>=2.14, python-dateutil>=2.9, colorama>=0.4.6, plus dev deps: pytest, pytest-asyncio
Create full directory structure with __init__.py files: python/core/, python/export/, python/formatters/, python/formatters/templates/, python/ipc/, python/utils/
Create src/ directory structure: src/components/layout/, src/components/auth/, src/components/dashboard/, src/components/export/, src/components/shared/, src/stores/, src/hooks/, src/types/
Create index.html (Vite entry point) at teleexport/index.html with root div and script src to /src/main.tsx
Run npm install to install all Node dependencies
Set up Python 3.11 environment and install Python dependencies using uv
acceptance_criteria: teleexport/package.json exists with all specified dependencies
All directories from the technical plan exist
tsconfig.json, vite.config.ts, and tailwind config are valid
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/teleexport && cat package.json | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert "react" in d.get("dependencies",{})'
cd /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/teleexport && ls node_modules/.package-lock.json 2>/dev/null || ls node_modules/ | head -5
